title: Robust Crisp Portuguese Chicken Dumplings
description: A nutty and crisp Portuguese dish featuring grana-padano, perfect for a post-workout meal, this flexitarian-friendly recipe is made in a wok and serves as a delicious and satisfying dinner option.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together flour, cornstarch, and a pinch of salt.
Add the chicken pieces to the bowl and toss to coat evenly.
In a small bowl, whisk together the egg and a splash of water.
Add the egg mixture to the bowl with the chicken and mix until just combined.
Stir in the shredded grana-padano cheese.
Heat the olive oil in a large wok over medium-high heat.
When the oil is hot, add the chicken mixture to the wok and cook until browned and crispy, about 5 minutes.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Garnish with chopped fresh parsley and serve hot.
Cook poultry to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F before serving.
